'''Cassus Fett's heavy blaster pistol''' was a custom model of a [[Mandalorian heavy blaster|heavy]] [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] that saw use prior to the [[Jedi Civil War]]. The adaptable [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] was used by the notorious [[Cassus Fett]], recognizable due to its distinctive wooden grip and black metal base. Fett wielded the weapon at the [[Battle of Jaga's Cluster]], when he killed the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of a Republic frigate—an action that earned Cassus Fett infamy across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Although Fett was rarely seen without it, the blaster was lost after Fett's death. It eventually was acquired by [[B'ree]], a merchant on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
When fully upgraded, it is the second most powerful blaster pistol in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''.
